product_overview: A frontend for generating high-quality, personalized LinkedIn/email outreach drafts using user resume skills and profile context; discovery and pipeline management surfaces leads and produces deterministic, idempotent drafts for manual sending.
core_goals: Allow users to discover leads, add them to a pipeline, and generate personalized outreach drafts in under 30 seconds.
Produce deterministic and idempotent drafts grounded in user-extracted skills and profile context, with channel auto-detection (email/LinkedIn).
Provide simple pipeline and candidate management without building full CRM/campaign automation or automated sending.
Enforce safety: no hallucinated skills, structured message format, length normalization, hedge removal, tone control, and AI timeout/retry handling.

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Sign up and sign in users; provide an authenticated session token used for all other API calls.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/signup with {name,email,password} -> Receive 201 Created with user_id -> POST /api/auth/login with {email,password} -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/profile with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with user profile
POST /api/auth/login with {email,password} (invalid credentials) -> Receive 401 Unauthorized with error message -> POST /api/auth/login after multiple failed attempts -> Receive 429 Too Many Requests

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Shows recent drafts and candidate summaries to let users pick up work quickly.
user_flows: GET /api/dashboard with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with recent_drafts and candidate_list -> GET /api/drafts/{draft_id} with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with draft content and metadata
GET /api/dashboard without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Candidates Management
features.description: Search for leads, view candidate details, and add leads to the user's pipeline.
user_flows: GET /api/candidates?query=software+engineer with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with lead list -> GET /api/candidates/{lead_id} with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with lead profile -> POST /api/pipeline/add with {lead_id} and Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 201 Created with pipeline_item_id

POST /api/pipeline/add with {lead_id} that is already in pipeline and Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 409 Conflict with message 'Lead already in pipeline' -> GET /api/pipeline with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with current pipeline

features.name: Brain Settings
features.description: Create and edit the AI "brain" context: skills, resume-extracted data and other context used to ground draft generation.
user_flows: GET /api/brain with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with current skills and context -> PUT /api/brain with {skills,context} and Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with updated brain
PUT /api/brain with malformed skills payload and Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 400 Bad Request with validation errors

features.name: General Settings
features.description: View and update user preferences such as tone defaults and UI options.
user_flows: GET /api/settings with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with user settings -> PUT /api/settings with updated preferences and Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with saved settings
PUT /api/settings with invalid preference values and Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 422 Unprocessable Entity with field errors

features.name: Draft Generation
features.description: Generate deterministic, idempotent, skill-grounded outreach drafts with channel auto-detection, tone and length controls, hedge removal, and timeout/retry safety.
user_flows: POST /api/drafts/generate with {lead_id, channel: 'auto', tone: 'friendly', max_length: 150} and Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with {draft_id, content, channel_detected:'linkedin'|'email', deterministic: true} -> GET /api/drafts/{draft_id} with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with final draft content
POST /api/drafts/generate with same payload and header Idempotency-Key: 'abc' and Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with same draft_id and identical content (idempotent response)

POST /api/drafts/generate with {lead_id,...} and Authorization: Bearer <token> when AI generation times out -> Receive 504 Gateway Timeout with message 'AI timeout, please retry' -> POST /api/drafts/generate retry with increased timeout/header Retry-After and Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with draft

POST /api/drafts/generate with payload that references skills not present in user brain and Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 400 Bad Request with message 'Referenced skills not found' (enforces no hallucination)

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Main dashboard showing recent drafts and candidate list

features.name: Brain Settings
features.description: Setup context and skills for the AI to use
